bids.reasoning: At t=0.00 there is no time pressure to concede, so I am targeting a near-maximum utility bid. The opponent’s only offer is all valueE, which gives me low utility and does not yet show any concession pattern, so I will open with my top values on all issues.

At t=0.02 it is very early, so I am targeting a near-maximal utility bid while making only a tiny concession to avoid repeating my previous exact offer. The opponent’s two offers are both very low utility for me and do not show meaningful concession, so I am holding firm on high-importance issues while only relaxing the low-impact issueE from my top valueB to valueA.

At t=0.04 it is still very early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid for myself while making a small concession on a low-weight issue to avoid simply repeating my last offer. The opponent’s offers have only slightly improved for me and remain far below my preferred region, so I will hold firm on the high-importance issues A, B, and C while varying issueD.

At t=0.06 it is still very early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid while making a small concession on a lower-weight issue. The opponent has not shown steady concession in utility to me and seems to repeatedly prefer valueE on issueD/issueE, so I concede issueD to valueE while holding firm on my highest-weight issues.

I am targeting a high utility bid while making concessions only on lower-weight issues, since it is still very early at t=0.08. The opponent’s offers have improved for me mainly on issueA and issueB, but they consistently keep issueD and issueE at valueE, suggesting those may matter to them, so I concede there while holding firm on my most important issues.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.70: it is early at t=0.10, so I should not drop close to the opponent’s latest offer yet. The opponent has been conceding on issueA/issueB/issueC and consistently keeps issueD/issueE at valueE, so I will concede on low-value issueD/issueE and modestly on issueB while holding my high-priority issueA and issueC.
